reviews.review_msg: AMAZING prof. I love her so much! The kindest, sweetest lady doing super interesting research. Very helpful and willing to help you if youre struggling. No exams.

Kimberly Plomb is the best teacher, & even better for online, she is so great & flexible with online, she is one of the only teachers not to give me stress, & i really did learn a lot from her class that you'll use in life, & understanding infectious diseases. I cant stress it enough how great she was, wish sfu had more prof like her

Hands down the most amazing prof I have ever had at SFU. She is so caring and gives such interesting lectures. I took evolutionary medicine with her as an intersessional and enjoyed it a lot, she was extra accessible and understanding during the COVID-19 pandemic. Wish the class wasn't intersessional so I didn't have to say goodbye

I really enjoyed this subject and found all of the information fascinating. She can be a tough grader, but gives excellent feedback for improvement. I feel it would have been beneficial to have more small quizzes rather than a large midterm as it was so information heavy

She is so kind and knowledgeable. The material for this course is fascinating but a 40%- 60% grading system is unfair. Only take this class if u really find the material interesting cause her exams are tricky. But overall very good professor.

100% my fav prof ever. So sweet and genuinely cares about her students. Tough marker and tests are HARD she says they are easy - they are not. But super accommodating and other assignments will keep your grade up. very organized class. if you don't care about the topic she's teaching don't take the course, it wont be a GPA booster
